summary: P0 EMERGENCY HOTFIX - KYC Submit Endpoint Fix VERIFIED. The router at /api/v1/kyc/submit now properly accepts the KYCSubmitRequest body parameter and passes it to the service method. All 13 backend tests passed, all admin sections verified working.

hotfix_validation.fix_description: Router at /kyc/submit was not accepting request body. Fixed by adding 'data: KYCSubmitRequest' parameter to router function (line 151) and passing it to kyc_service.submit_application(user_id, data)
evidence: API response shows applications submitted successfully (Test User submitted 2026-02-24T14:16:02)
KYC Queue shows 2 pending applications with full personal info

key_validations: ✓ KYC submit endpoint accepts body (no 422 body parsing error)
✓ KYC submit validates required documents (PASSPORT, PROOF_OF_ADDRESS)
✓ Admin KYC pending endpoint returns submitted applications with personal info

admin_sections_tested: Overview - PASS (92 Users, 74 Active, 2 Pending KYC, 132 Transactions)

critical_code_review_comments: KYC submit endpoint fix is correctly implemented
Router function signature updated to accept 'data: KYCSubmitRequest' at line 151
Service method call updated to pass data parameter at line 158
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 KYC Submit Hotfix verified. The router now accepts KYCSubmitRequest body and passes it to service. Two pending KYC applications available for testing (Kostakis Kalvanas and Test User). All admin sections working: Users, KYC Queue, Accounts, Transfers, Support Tickets.
